title: 2026 Oscars Best Picture Predictions
text: According to Variety's awards predictions, the 2026 Best Picture race features a tight competition between two frontrunners: Sinners - Ryan Coogler's vampire drama is predicted to win. The film holds significant wins including ACE editing, SAG ensemble, and WGA awards. A victory would make history, as it would bring the first Black woman a best picture win and potentially secure a directing prize for Coogler. One Battle After Another - Paul Thomas Anderson's political action epic has amassed an impressive awards collection, winning Critics Choice, Golden Globes, BAFTA, ACE Eddies, DGA, PGA, WGA, and at least one SAG prize. Historically, no film winning all these major precursors has ever lost Best Picture. The article emphasizes that one of the most competitive Oscar landscapes in recent memory will unfold at the 98th Academy Awards ceremony on March 15, hosted by Conan O'Brien. Regardless of the outcome, records will fall on Oscar night given the unprecedented award combinations held by each film.
